title: Menorca International Film Festival (FICME)
location: Teatre Principal de Maó, Cinemes Canal Salat y otros espacios de Maó y Ciutadella
description: The island's annual film gathering, with a Mediterranean spirit and a strong social and environmental conscience, centred on national and international short films. The 2026 edition moves to 8-13 September, split between Maó and Ciutadella. Organised by the Fundació Foment del Turisme de Menorca; the full programme and venues are announced later.
